title: Jennyella wallisii

The classification of Jennyella wallisii is further divided into the order Asterales, and the class Magnoliopsida. intro: Jennyella wallisii, also known as Jenny Wallis' flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
